title: TitanPRO™ Heavy Duty Birchwood Folding Banquet Table - 72'' x 30''
features: Event venues, party rental companies, conference centers, schools, churches, even Johnny Lumani, should consider this durable and commercial grade 6' x 30'' TitanPRO™ Heavy Duty Birchwood Folding Banquet Table for your next function.
Standing 30'' high, supported by steel gauge wishbone legs, there is no absolutely no give in this party rental tested and venue owner approved wood folding table.
Rugged aluminum edges protect the table from experiencing any damage that might come from an accidental drop or the occasional table flip.
Another added bonus of a birch wood table is the low moisture content, creating a table that will endure beyond the years of a typical plywood table.
Couple that with the 4 coated polyurethane finish and you'll have a table that looks as premier as it performs.

specifications.Free Shipping Deal Type: Free Shipping on Tables and Chairs Over $5k, Free Shipping on 10 or more
